Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlemenet And For Entry Of Order Approving Settlement Agreemen As To Deft Wilson Sporting Goods Co.
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. WILLIAM VERICK, TEL. NO. (707) 268-8900 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENIVRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Order Approving Settlement Agreement As To Defendant Wilson Sporting Goods Company IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
